name: Strip Foundation Calculator
seo_description: Calculate concrete volume, cement, sand, gravel and steel for continuous strip foundations. Free construction calculator.
result_context: The foundation requires {vol_m3} m³ of concrete, {cement_sacos} bags of cement, {sand_m3} m³ of sand, {gravel_m3} m³ of gravel and {acero_kg} kg of steel.
formula_display: Volume = Length x Width x Depth
mistakes: Not excavating deep enough (below frost line)
Not compacting the trench base before pouring concrete
Using insufficient width for the soil bearing capacity
desc: Strip Foundation Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
